overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person exploration of a moody, rain-slicked rooftop parking area overlooking a futuristic neon-lit city skyline. The player character walks past a sleek black sports car, examines the waterfront view, then proceeds through a narrow service passage into an industrial loading bay where three NPCs are conversing before returning to the rooftop.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop parking overlook with waterfront view

events.description: player walks past the parked car toward the rooftop edge
player approaches and picks up cucumber juice item from ledge

agents.ego_description: walking around the rooftop parking area, examining the car and vending machine, then moving to the edge to look at the waterfront

entered.detail: sleek black sports car with green underglow lighting parked near the vending machine
illuminated red and white vending machine with glowing product displays
futuristic high-rise buildings with antenna spires silhouetted against the night sky
tall viewing telescope mounted on the railing for observing the waterfront
concrete safety barrier with rectangular cutouts overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked rooftop parking area in a futuristic city at night. A sleek black sports car with green accent lighting sits near a glowing red vending machine. The player walks past the vehicle toward the edge of the building where a coin-operated telescope stands mounted on the concrete railing, overlooking a dark body of water with a distant statue and the illuminated city skyline beyond.

events.description: player leaves the open rooftop and enters a narrow covered passage
ambient light drops significantly as player moves deeper into the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow service passage with wet concrete floors, moving toward an industrial interior

entered.detail: black metal security gate blocking part of the passage ahead
tall metal support beam with cross-bracing
bright floodlight illuminating the wet concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the open rooftop into a narrow, covered service walkway. The space is flanked by concrete walls and industrial pillars, with bright artificial floodlights casting harsh shadows on the wet ground. A metal security gate is visible ahead as the player moves deeper into the enclosed passage, leaving the city view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading bay with shipping containers

events.description: player enters the main indoor service bay from the narrow passage
player slows down and circles around a group of three NPCs having a conversation

agents.ego_description: entering the industrial bay and circling around a group of three NPCs who are standing and talking near shipping containers

notable_agents.action: woman with bright purple hair standing with arms crossed, engaged in conversation
man wearing a green glowing vest holding a large rifle over his shoulder

entered.detail: large black industrial crates and containers stacked along the walls
heavy equipment and machinery carts with glowing blue lights
cluster of three characters standing on red-painted concrete floor section
black equipment case with white Arasaka corporation logo
large industrial garage door with red warning light above it

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow passage into a spacious industrial loading bay with red and black painted concrete floors. The area contains shipping containers, machinery carts, and industrial shelving. Three NPCs stand conversing in the center—a woman with purple hair, a woman in black tactical gear, and a man with a glowing green vest carrying a rifle. The player circles around them, observing the industrial equipment and the large roll-up door at the back of the bay.

events.description: player exits the indoor service bay back to the open rooftop
player approaches the parked car and vending machine area

agents.ego_description: walking back out of the industrial bay toward the rooftop exit, passing the NPCs again and returning to the car

notable_agents.action: the three NPCs continue their conversation as the player passes by

entered.detail: the same black sports car visible through the exit gate, then approached
futuristic buildings visible again as the player exits to the rooftop
glowing vending machine near the car

segments.scene_description: The player exits the industrial bay, passing the group of three NPCs again, and emerges back onto the open rooftop. The black sports car and red vending machine come back into view as the player approaches the original starting area. The city skyline is visible in the background against the dark overcast sky, completing the exploration loop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, rain-slicked rooftop into a claustrophobic industrial interior before looping back to the city skyline. It begins by gliding past a sleek black sports car and a glowing red vending machine toward a telescope overlooking a dark waterfront and a neon-lit futuristic city. As the camera moves away from the ledge, the scene shifts into a narrow, covered service walkway where harsh floodlights cast deep shadows against concrete walls and industrial pillars. The passage then opens into a spacious loading bay filled with shipping containers and machinery, where the camera circles a group of three NPCs including a woman with purple hair and a man in a glowing green vest. Finally, the movement reverses through the bay and back through the corridor, emerging once more onto the rooftop to reveal the sports car and the overcast city horizon.
